series_metadata.series_description: Reports filed by companies, licensed in Ohio filed annually, required by the Social Security Act for Medicare Supplements. 3901-1-41 (J)(11)(f)

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain hard copy until electronic, then destroy. Retain electronic 5 years, then destroy. ; Paper: Retain hard copy until electronic, then destroy. Retain electronic 5 years, then destroy., Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Wastepaper
